domain: B2B SaaS subscription billing. A growth-stage developer tools company (NovaDev) that uses Stripe for all billing. Core product: API monitoring SaaS with starter ($29/mo), pro ($99/mo), and enterprise ($299/mo) tiers. Internal Postgres database is the source of truth for customer identity and links to Stripe via billing_platform + external_id.

personas.name: growing-startup
personas.description: NovaDev — a growth-stage B2B SaaS company with ~30 customers in the internal Postgres database across 3 plans (starter $29/mo, pro $99/mo, enterprise $299/mo). All customers use Stripe for billing. Each customer in the Postgres customers table has billing_platform='stripe' + external_id linking to their Stripe customer ID. Mix of monthly and annual billing, some overdue invoices, a few disputed charges, recent upgrades. 6 months of history.
